ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the movie */,
  "gross_revenue" REAL /* Gross revenue generated by the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company responsible for the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Main cast of the movie */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "rating_mpaa" TEXT /* MPAA rating of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the movie */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views of the movie */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the movie */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the engagement metrics were recorded */,
  "engagement_platform" TEXT /* Platform where engagement occurred (e.g., YouTube, Facebook) */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_engagement_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data analyst, content manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "user_engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user engagement event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, like, comment) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., watched trailer, read review) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "advertising_channels" TEXT /* Advertising channels used (e.g., social media, TV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_campaigns_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions for the campaign */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on the campaign ads */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions from the campaign */,
  "cost_per_click" REAL /* Cost per click for the campaign */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the metrics were recorded */,
  "ad_format" TEXT /* Format of the ad (e.g., image, video) */,
  "placement" TEXT /* Placement of the ad (e.g., homepage, sidebar) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_metrics_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES movie_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-5 scale) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the user's review */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_demographics" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user (e.g., male, female, other) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Interests of the user (e.g., action, drama, comedy) */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the user (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the user (e.g., high school, college) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) */,
  "os_type" TEXT /* Type of operating system used (e.g., Windows, macOS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., action, drama) */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., Oscar, Golden Globe) */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "is_won" INTEGER /* Whether the movie won the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_awards_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., Rotten Tomatoes, Metacritic) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was published */,
  "review_rating" REAL /* Rating given by the reviewer (1-5 scale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
